commands.review_summary:
The PR changes the sandbox fs path resolver to append the container workdir hint to out-of-root errors and adds a unit test for that message.

Reproducibility: yes. from source inspection: an absolute path like /tmp/outside misses both container and host mounts, then current main throws the sandbox-root escape without defaultContainerRoot. I did not run a live sandbox command because this review must keep the checkout read-only.
commands.review_followup: The remaining blockers are contributor-supplied real behavior proof and a small reviewed message regression, not a safe automated repair lane for this external PR.
